---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or awkward today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it's a new output format, note that exporters are
pluggable — see the *"Adding a new exporter"* section in
[CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Examples, references to the PostgreSQL protocol docs, sample output, etc.
